build.buildCommand: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium && EXPO_PUBLIC_DOMAIN=gameplanjarvisai.up.railway.app EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID=$GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID npx expo export --platform web --output-dir static-build/web --clear && npm run server:build && node scripts/patch-chat-template.mjs

deploy.startCommand: node scripts/railway-db-push.mjs --force && node scripts/railway-prestart.mjs && npm run server:prod
